title: posd-lint findings
description: Output of `posd-lint --format json`. A JSON array of Finding records. Each Finding describes one candidate PoSD red flag, optionally annotated by an AI judge.

file.description: Path to the source file relative to the scan root.

line.description: 1-indexed line number of the start of the offending construct.

end_line.description: 1-indexed end line; null when the finding is a single line.

evidence.description: The specific deterministic measurement that triggered the finding (e.g. "21 public methods").

rubric_ref.description: Section reference into posd-reference.md, e.g. "5" or "12.3".

rubric_title.description: Human-readable title of the rubric section.

code_excerpt.description: Source snippet around line..end_line. Empty string if not captured.

judge_reasoning.description: Judge's rationale for the verdict. Empty when unjudged.

judge_recommendation.description: Concrete refactoring recommendation from the judge. Empty when unjudged.
